meaning: 库尔斯克[苏联中俄罗斯丘陵西南部城市]
examples: Another RBMK-1000 of the 5th unit of the Kursk NPP is nearing completion.
The operation to raise the Kursk is scheduled to begin in about two weeks.
Yuri Khramtsov, manager of a farm in the Kursk region, expects a strong crop this year.
In terms of one battle that deserves the spotlight in these failures is Kursk .
The Kursk had suffered two on-board explosions, and sunk to the bottom like a stone.
